title: ROSEBURG RESCUE MISSION MEN'S SHELTER - 211info
text: ROSEBURG RESCUE MISSION MEN'S SHELTER ROSEBURG RESCUE MISSION MEN'S SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides an overnight men's shelter with a dayroom offering showers, laundry facilities, meals, and clothing. Guests must attend the chapel service. 526 SE Lane Avenue Roseburg, OR 97470 Eligibility: Men age 18 and older. Service animals only. Hours: Check in before 6pm Shelter curfew is 6:30pm Meal times: Breakfast: Monday-Friday 6:30am, Saturday-Sunday 7:30am Lunch: Monday-Friday noon, Saturday-Sunday 1pm Dinner: 7 days per week 5:30pm Email (541) 673-3004 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 673-3004 Main phone Main phone (541) 673-3004 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Douglas County SITE HOURS: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Services: Community Shelters * Homeless Men Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - TRANSITONAL HOUSING PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - THE PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
